title: VeloraOS 1.10.7 - Release Readiness
releaseNotes: Expands Notifications into persistent local history for updates, model downloads and setup completion.
Adds model download storage preflight, Retry and real Cancel support for active Ollama downloads.
Adds a polished VeloraOS-is-ready completion screen to first-run setup.
Adds a System Info health overview for version, CPU, memory, disk, GPU, Ollama, installed models and licence status.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, installed models, licensing, device identity, secure update verification and rollback.
